title: Bitdeer August 2025 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitdeer announced August 2025 production and operations metrics. The company reported continued progress toward its 40 EH/s self-mining capacity target and accelerated AI Cloud deployment. August 2025 marked significant momentum in execution across Bitcoin mining and AI Cloud service initiatives. The company achieved sustained production milestones while advancing major infrastructure projects in Rockdale, Texas and Tydal, Norway. SEALMINER A4 tape-out remained on schedule for Q4 2025, positioning the company to deploy industry-leading mining hardware in early 2026. GPU fleet expansion supported rapid growth in AI Cloud annualized recurring revenue, which reached $69 million by April 2026. The August 2025 update reflected Bitdeer's execution discipline and ability to advance multiple major initiatives simultaneously. Infrastructure investments positioned the company for sustained growth through 2026.
